_comment: Tax Collected at Source (India LRS, education remittances). Config-driven — rates update without code changes. MVP rule: loan-funded education = 0% TCS.
_thresholdNote: ₹7,00,000 in paise — TCS applies only above this within a financial year.

EDUCATION_LOAN.note: Education funded by a loan from a notified financial institution — 0% TCS (MVP).
